name: createManifestTC
description: Create a new manifest with valid data
descriptionHtml: Create a new manifest with valid data

testStage.description: Create a new manifest with valid data

steps.name: Click on Manual Manifest insertion button
Search for 'الأسكندرية' in the active dropdown
Click on Manifest View button (عرض بيانات المنافيست)
Search for 'VENTO DI BORA' in the active dropdown
Select item 'VENTO DI BORA' from dropdown results
Open Country Departure dropdown (دولة ميناء المغادرة)
Search for 'الجزائر' in the active dropdown
Search for 'اورن' in the active dropdown
Open Expected Arrival Date picker (تاريخ الوصول المتوقع)
Click on 'حسنًا' (OK) to confirm date selection
Click on 'حسنًا' (OK) to confirm date selection
Click on 'حسنًا' (OK) to confirm date selection
Click on 'حسنًا' (OK) to confirm date selection
Search for 'ساحة قسم سابع' in the active dropdown
Select item 'ساحة قسم سابع' from dropdown results
Check 'يوجد ركاب' (Having Passengers) if not already checked
Enter notes: ملاحظات تجريبية لاختبار إنشاء المنافيست
Verify Manifest creation success message appears
Extract Manifest Number from success message
